overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, industrial overpasses, and elevated highways. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, with distinct red and teal neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban street with red neon-lit walls

events.description: approaching the bright lights of the underpass entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow wet street flanked by tall buildings with horizontal red neon strips

entered.detail: tall building facade with horizontal red neon light strips reflecting on wet surface
rain-slicked asphalt road with reflections of neon lights
low concrete wall running along the right side of the street
bright white lights visible at the end of the street marking underpass entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, foggy urban street at night. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt, flanked by a building with striking horizontal red neon strips on the left and a concrete barrier on the right. The atmosphere is moody and deserted, with bright lights visible in the distance marking the entrance to an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass transitioning to open intersection

events.description: entering the covered underpass with bright overhead fluorescent lighting
exiting the underpass into a wider intersection area with elevated highway visible

agents.ego_description: moving through the illuminated underpass and emerging into a wider urban intersection

entered.detail: intense white fluorescent tube lights lining the underpass ceiling
massive concrete and steel highway overpass with support columns

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered underpass illuminated by harsh overhead fluorescent lights, transitioning from the narrow neon-lit street. After passing through the tunnel, the scene opens into a wider intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway structure. The environment shifts from intimate red neon to industrial concrete and bright white lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway with industrial infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the elevated highway structure and industrial pipes overhead
camera returns to forward-facing position while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the elevated highway, briefly looking up at the industrial infrastructure before continuing forward

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in the distance beneath the highway

entered.detail: network of large rusted pipes and conduits running beneath the highway
warm yellow illuminated signs on buildings to the right
tall street lamp with orange glow illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, the camera pans up to reveal the industrial infrastructure of pipes and steel beams overhead. The lighting shifts to warmer orange tones from street lamps, and a lone pedestrian is visible walking in the distance. The atmosphere is heavy with fog and urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with red neon lighting and pedestrian activity

events.description: a vehicle passes by on the right side of the street
approaching a group of people standing near a building entrance with red neon lights

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward a street corner, passing pedestrians and approaching a group near a neon-lit entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near the building entrance with red neon lighting, part of a small group

entered.detail: building facade with vertical red neon strips and entrance
orange metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a street corner dominated by a building with intense red neon lighting. The camera passes a metal railing and digital billboards while a vehicle drives by on the right. A small group of people stands near the neon-lit building entrance, adding sparse human presence to the otherwise deserted cyberpunk street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a narrow street into a vast industrial underpass before returning to a crowded city corner. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt flanked by striking red neon strips and a concrete barrier, moving steadily toward the bright glow of a distant tunnel. As the camera enters the covered underpass, the intimate red lighting shifts to harsh overhead fluorescents before the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway. The perspective then pans upward to reveal a heavy network of industrial pipes and steel beams under warm orange street lamps, passing a lone pedestrian amidst the fog and urban decay. Finally, the camera turns toward a street corner where intense red neon and digital billboards illuminate a passing vehicle and a small group of people gathered near a building entrance.
